description_long: This is a modern, rectangular bungalow surrounded by a tall hedge, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade includes a decorative white gate, a driveway with two parked cars, and a landscaped garden with several mature trees and a swimming pool. The building has large, horizontally oriented windows on the side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper floor includes a balcony and open terrace spaces, while the ground floor opens to a patio and garden area. The exterior is finished in dark gray with white accents, and the property is enclosed for privacy. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a decorative front gate, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, all enclosed by a tall hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative white gate, driveway with cars, main entrance, and landscaped garden with pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large horizontal windows, upper balcony, and dense perimeter hedge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open terrace, garden, and the back of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, pool area, and the integration of the house with the surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal side windows and grouped openings
